title: Semantik Architect Contract Schema — ConstructionPlan
description: Canonical planner-to-renderer runtime handoff object. A ConstructionPlan represents one clause/sentence realization unit after planning and slot-building, and before backend realization.

construction_id.description: Canonical planner-selected construction identifier. New runtime plans use backend-independent snake_case IDs such as copula_equative_simple or relational_membership_affiliation.

lang_code.description: Normalized lower-case language code for realization, e.g. eng, fra, ar, en.

slot_map.description: Canonical semantic role/value mapping for this construction. Plan-level fields such as construction_id, lang_code, generation_options, lexical_bindings, provenance, and metadata must not be embedded here.

generation_options.description: Renderer-facing generation controls selected by planning or orchestration, such as tense, register, sentence_kind, or allow_fallback.

topic_entity_id.description: Optional discourse/topic anchor for the sentence, usually a stable entity identifier such as a Wikidata QID.

focus_role.description: Optional discourse focus role, expressed as a canonical semantic slot name such as profession, nationality, subject, predicate_nominal, or location.

lexical_bindings.description: Optional planner/lexical-resolution output mapping semantic slot names to normalized lexical references. In the common case, values are LexemeRef objects keyed by slot name.

provenance.description: Optional provenance / traceability bag carried with the plan, for example source frame IDs, extraction notes, statement IDs, or lexical-resolution metadata.

metadata.description: Optional migration / diagnostics metadata bag retained by the current runtime implementation for wrapper/base construction information and other non-canonical plan annotations.
